Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 13}Not all teleporters are one-way. You will sometimes encounter another type of {f 0 1 2}teleporter{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}This teleporter works like an elevator. It allows you to {f 0 1 2}travel between floors{f 0 1 27} with teleporters or return to the entrance. Use them to explore Tartarus more efficiently.[n]{f 1 1}
